title: Spicy
description: light and simple mod that adds several new plants and a system for more interesting food creation
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1572e71e44457de87402af453209d5c5c497829.png)

**light and simple mod that adds several new plants and a system for more interesting food creation**
 

with this mod you will be able to meet 2 new types of plants that will give you the opportunity to give your food more taste and uniqueness, which depends on what kind of plant you use, and you can also find red salt under the sea in caves not far from the bottom
 

When adding spices to food, you need to keep in mind the saturation of the food because this will help you understand how much you can add spices; by going too far and adding too much you will get negative effects, forcing you to choose the right proportions depending on the food


 ![hot pepper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a0d8f87b5c94e4f76d17cca6b60fc94777b3c3e.png)
 
**hot pepper can only be found in the hot fields of the savannah; its spiciness will add healing properties to food**

but too spicy food can burn you

![red salt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cc7878a3657a134c7d95122666cd17c875273a2.png)

**Red salt can be found under the seas and oceans in caves, usually not so deep, a good balance will help you get better satiety from food**

but too much salt will only make you hungry

![Garlic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dbbf4a1b84ea70a80ef4c501b6951faa3dd486b.png)

**Garlic can be found in any high place in the world and its benefits will be noticed even if you are completely healthy**
but too much will leave a very bad aftertaste

![new food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/323ca7968c10031050abb881daae2d6beb670584.png)!
 
Pepper can be found in savannas, deserts, and jungles.
Basil can be found in jungles and plains.
Garlic can be found in forests and plains.
Ginger can be found in forests, jungles, and swamps.

and also in the mod itself you will be able to access the list of achievements to navigate and understand the capabilities and obtain recipes

I will also be happy to answer any questions you may have about this and my other mods, you can find me on discord riki6007
